Useful words

  • 邦字 ほうじ · houji японская письменность
  • 邦画 ほうが · houga японская живопись

Example sentences

  • 邦を見ます。I look at the kanji 邦.

Flash Kanji note

What to watch

Learn 邦 through words first, then reinforce it in sentence and stroke-order practice.
